REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1218 Meekland Court, Santa Rosa, Ca)
Off Calendar Jul-10-2015 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch.

Re: Report of Sale for 1218 Meekland Court, Santa Rosa:
The Court stated that there is no one present to overbid. The sale was confirmed at $263,500.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required.

Re: Report of Sale for 6525 California Street, San Francisco:
The Court stated that there is an issue with the proof of service, that item 3 is not checked and item 4b is incomplete. Mr. Der stated that he can file an amended notice, that notice was sent, that typically they check item 3b and that the notice was mailed from San Francisco. The sale was confirmed at $1,000,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed on June 17,2015. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order) and subject to receipt of a fully completed proof of service. An additional bond in the amount of $750,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-11-2013 Continued To Oct-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch (Trustee).

The Court indicated that the issue was whether fees should be based on trust and conservatorship services. Mr. Der explained that it saves money to file one petition and the Ms. Dolch waives her fees in the conservatorship. The Court stated that our court policy does not allow fees to be based on trust and conservatorship service, that an amendment to request for fees relating to the trust only shall be filed. The First Account and Report was continued to October 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Der to file an amendment to request for fees.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)
